canonical_statement: Keypair, faucet, transfer, and basic contract lifecycle are available for experimentation on the public testnet. Staking, governance, and some advanced or operator paths are not yet production-complete.

README.md: It is not the live website frontend source for `dytallix.com`
The explorer and faucet repositories are docs-only service-surface repos today
docs/publication-status.md: live website frontend source is not yet represented by a dedicated public repository
published node snapshot plus reproducible deployment templates
docs/sdk-reference.md: `get_validators()` and `get_delegations()` still require a direct node
docs/index.md: It is not the live website frontend source for `dytallix.com`.
